name: Eggs a La Goop
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry several strips of bacon until well done and crumble.
2. Set aside.
3. In a skillet with a little oil, cook mushrooms and onions over medium heat until softened.
4. Add Cream of Mushroom soup (undiluted) and stir until the mixture is liquidized.
5. In a separate bowl, whip the eggs.
6. Fold the whipped eggs into the mushroom mixture.
7. When the eggs are almost set, add shrimp and continue stirring.
8. Sprinkle cheese over the top and place in a 300 degree oven until the cheese is melted.
9. Remove from the oven and scoop onto plates.
10. Top with crumbled bacon.
11. Serve with toasted English muffins and orange marmalade. Enjoy.
